rationale: Chokepoint integrity holds by construction. (1) ALLOWED_CLI is a static 4-element string-literal array at ms-panel.js:45-50 with zero interpolation/concatenation; the four verb constants are destructured in one binding at 51-52; `mindspec complete` appears NOWHERE (grep confirms no command, no comment). (2) buildCommand (60-100) is the sole assembler: fixed per-verb flags (--spec/--target/--bead/--round; the codex sandbox flags fixed in the array entry) come from the template, callers pass only user-derived values, and the leading-dash guard (64-73) applies to values — an exact match to the plan's round-3 reconciliation (plan lines ~446-540, values-only guard). All four command call sites (304/438/491/505) pass a destructured verb identifier + values; none retypes a literal or does string surgery on a buildCommand result. (3) I mutated an isolated copy: adding a 5th array entry AND injecting a stray `mindspec panel tally` literal outside the array each FAIL TestMsPanelWorkflow_AllowedCLIExactSet (element-count/mindspec-complete string + positive-enumeration + one-destructure-binding pins all hold). Baseline + both structural tests green; go build clean. (4) Scope: git show --stat = exactly the 7 named files. git status clean (only the untracked review dir).
findings: ALLOWED_CLI (ms-panel.js:45-50): static 4-literal array, no interpolation; destructured once at 51-52; matches the exact set (panel create/codex exec read-only/panel verify/panel tally).
`mindspec complete` absent from the whole file (command and comment) — grep NONE; TestMsPanelWorkflow_AllowedCLIExactSet:134 also pins this over full content.

buildCommand is the single assembler: verb-membership assert (61-63), values-only leading-dash guard (64-73), fixed per-verb templates (75-99). All 4 call sites route through it with verb identifier + values only.

Mutation proof: 5th-command insertion -> test fails (5 elements + mindspec complete); call-site literal retype -> test fails (mindspec-bearing literal outside array). Both classes are genuinely caught.
Scope-fence: git show --stat 1ad0d796 == the 7 named files, +1487; both ms-panel.js copies byte-identical (diff -q).
